recommended_pattern: A work-first index with distinctive project previews that lead into concise case studies of role, constraints, and outcome.

decision_rules.if_creative_field: Give each project an art-directed preview that demonstrates range without erasing attribution.
decision_rules.if_minimal_portfolio: Use crop, typography, and pacing to create character; keep motion subordinate to the work.
decision_rules.if_confidential_work: State the constraint and describe the contribution without inventing undisclosable outcomes.

anti_patterns: Template cards that leave the visitor unable to identify the creator's role.
Generic mockups that make unrelated projects look interchangeable.
Motion that delays access to the actual work.
